_comment: Update pointer for the 'Update Library' flow. A device fetches this file, compares latest.libraryVersion to its installed catalog, and (if newer) downloads latest.url (the catalog manifest), then fetches each board listed in manifest.boards in order, validates them, and loads them via loadLibrary(boards, { libraryVersion }).

latest.notes: Minor: two widely-adopted community boards added. MarcDuino (marcduino): 23 commands over the CuriousMarc command language — ':' sequences (:SE) and panel open/close/RC/hold, '*' holoprojector on/off/random/RC/reset/hold, magic-panel and on-board HP light/flicker, '$' sound (bank+track, play bank, and the control/preset macros $R/$s/$S/$L/$c/…), and '@' JawaLite-forwarded logic effect/text/charset and PSI state. JAWALite Logic Displays (jawalite): the shared display grammar spoken by Teeces logics, the original JEDI board, and Teensy/ESP LogicEngine firmware — bare 'xxYzzz' effect (T), random style (R), PSI state (S), charset (P), and text (M). Sourced from the MarcDuino command reference and its JawaLite forwarding table (curiousmarc.com, 2026-07); board catalog 19 -> 21.
